Designed with a focus on contemporary aesthetics and functional living, the property provides a peaceful sanctuary from the urban hustle while keeping you connected to the heartbeat of the city.Property SpecificationsThis meticulously maintained apartment spans a super built-up area of 1,135 sq. ft and is positioned on the 6th floor of a 7-storey building.
